---
title: "publications"
title-block-banner: false
---

*Coming soon — I'm setting up a structured publications list with plain-language summaries.*

<!--
Option A: Maintain a publications.yml and render programmatically
Option B: List manually in this file with DOI/preprint/code links

Each entry should include:
- Citation
- One-sentence plain-language summary
- Links: DOI | preprint | code | blog post (if applicable)
-->
